source_name: AEMO NEM wholesale spot price by region

fields.price_basis: Volume-weighted average spot price for the financial year, A$/MWh. NEM spot price is half-hourly (5-minute settlement from October 2021); the annual VWAP is published in AEMO QED.
fields.primary_source_document: AEMO QED — Annual report and quarterly editions.
fields.keying_plan: Key the volume-weighted spot for each region from AEMO QED full-year edition. Note that contract / hedge prices (ASX 24) differ from spot; spot is the headline number.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual VWAP spot prices per NEM region. Five NEM regions only; WA WEM has its own balancing market price reported separately.
citation: AEMO Quarterly Energy Dynamics; AEMO Data Dashboard.
